name: Zweigart Bus Svc Inc
principals: Martha Zweigart (President); Zweigart family (Lewis E. Zweigart, founder, d.2010)
districts_or_customers: Sparta Community Unit School District 140 (since 1963); Evansville/Sparta IL area; also operates from Sparta, IL location
recent_news: Long-standing family operator since 1963; founder Lewis E. Zweigart passed in 2010 with second-generation Martha Zweigart now President — multi-generational succession dynamic.
fit_notes: Classic small-town family tuck-in: 60+ year operator on a single-district contract (Sparta CUSD 140) in rural southern IL. Aging principal and multi-location footprint (Evansville + Sparta) suggest succession-driven sale potential, though sub-$2.5M revenue makes it a true bolt-on.

name: New Frontier MD Bus
districts_or_customers: Likely Allegany County, MD area (Cumberland); no confirmed district contracts found
recent_news: No web presence, news, or third-party listings located for 'New Frontier MD Bus' at the Virginia Ave Cumberland address; existence as an operating school-bus contractor not independently verified.
fit_notes: Unverifiable. With only ~10 employees, no website, no district mentions, and no leadership name, this is sub-scale and high-risk as a tuck-in until ownership and district contracts are confirmed via direct outreach.

name: A Plus School Bus
principals: Maria Borberg (Office Manager); A Plus Bus USA Corp (DOT #2064580)
districts_or_customers: Miami-Dade County Public Schools (school board-approved vendor); private and public schools for field trips; church and sports charters
recent_news: Markets 25+ years of student transportation experience as a Miami-Dade school board-approved partner; remains a small Doral-based charter/field-trip-focused operator.
fit_notes: Very small Miami-Dade field-trip/charter operator rather than a route contractor; limited fleet and revenue (~$223K) make it sub-scale for Summit. Miami-Dade approval has some value, but tuck-in attractiveness is low absent district route contracts.

name: Prigge's School Buses Bus Info
principals: Dennis Prigge (Owner); founded by John and Lucille Prigge with sons Jerry and Jim; now 3rd/4th generation Prigge family
districts_or_customers: Sheboygan Area School District (primary contract since 1950); Central High School
recent_news: Multi-generational (75+ year) family operator running the SASD contract since 1950; in-house factory-trained mechanics; quiet, stable single-district contractor with no M&A signals located.
fit_notes: Textbook family-succession tuck-in: 4th-generation owner, single anchor contract with Sheboygan Area School District since 1950, factory-trained in-house maintenance. Small (~$1.4M revenue, ~25 staff) but high-quality reputation makes it an attractive small bolt-on to a WI platform footprint.

name: Caring Heart Transport LLC
districts_or_customers: Approved provider with area hospitals; Lakeland Care Inc. (Family Care/IRIS) network; service area across Rock, Walworth, Green, and Dane counties (Janesville, Madison, Beloit, Monroe, etc.)
recent_news: Recent 2021 start-up; operates 24/7 NEMT/wheelchair service across four southern WI counties; listed on Lakeland Care and 211 Wisconsin provider directories.
fit_notes: Pure NEMT/wheelchair operator — not a school-bus contractor. Off-strategy for Summit's core student-transportation platform; only a fit if Summit were to push into SPED/Medicaid wheelchair adjacencies. Young (2021) founder with no succession signal; exclude as a tuck-in target.
